channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: U.S. and Iran agree on peace deal to end the war, Trump and Pakistan say
item.description: The deal follows weeks of mixed messaging from both Washington and Tehran on the trajectory of the conflict.

item.title: Stock futures jump after the U.S. and Iran reach a deal to end the war: Live updates
item.description: The three major indexes are coming off a winning week.

item.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

item.title: Trump celebrates turning 80 with a UFC cage-fighting event while big issues loom over his presidency
item.description: The president has sought to tie Sunday's event to larger, months-long celebrations of the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence.

item.title: Trump heads to G7 summit in France after reaching deal to end war with Iran
item.description: The G7 is likely to address the Iran peace deal, as well as Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe.

item.title: The World Cup could add $17 billion to the U.S. economy. Here are the stocks set to benefit
item.description: The 2026 World Cup could add $17 billion to the U.S. economy, largely driven by digital advertising, travel and consumer spending.

item.title: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
item.description: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.

item.title: JetBlue bets big on Fort Lauderdale, from a new airport lounge to an international gateway
item.description: JetBlue faces heavy competition from Miami International Airport, an American Airlines stronghold.

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the growth prospects of these 3 stocks
item.description: Continued volatility presents an opportunity to find stocks trading at attractive prices and benefit from their long-term growth potential.

item.title: This Chinese consumer stock could double if its global industrial pivot succeeds, JPMorgan says
item.description: A Chinese home appliance company has the chance to become a global player, JPMorgan analysts said in a report that gave several stocks an overweight rating.

item.title: Can Trump Accounts help close the wealth gap? Here's what experts say stands in the way
item.description: Trump Accounts come with free money for some children, but it may not be enough to reduce the wealth gap, some experts say.

item.title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
item.description: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.

item.title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
item.description: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

item.title: After 53 years, the New York Knicks are NBA champions. And the wait sure seemed worth it
item.description: The New York Knicks are NBA champions for the first time since 1973, beating the San Antonio Spurs in five games.

item.title: These stocks are the most overbought or oversold after a choppy week on Wall Street
item.description: Reaction to earnings reports led Adobe to become oversold, while J.M. Smucker Company was left overbought.

item.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
item.description: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

item.title: Putin, Zelenskyy speak with Trump by phone as drone strikes kill 2 in Russia and UK detains tanker
item.description: The leaders also discussed Iran, with Trump saying a U.S. agreement with Tehran was close.

item.title: Swiss reject plan to cap its population at 10 million, avoiding EU clash and cheering business
item.description: The referendum had put businesses on edge due to concerns it could lead to the end of free movement of labor between Switzerland and the EU.

item.title: UAE denies 'false' reports of fund transfer to Iran
item.description: The statement follows a Reuters report that the UAE has agreed to unlock billions of dollars of frozen funds for Iran.

item.title: UK forces board sanctioned Russian shadow fleet oil tanker
item.description: The U.K.'s Ministry of Defence says the SMYRTOS was in the English Channel and will be held off the south coast during investigations.

item.title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market in the week ahead
item.description: The Kevin Warsh era is upon us.

item.title: IPO investing: What are IPO stocks and the best brokers for IPO access?
item.description: Some brokerages offer IPO access before a company goes public, but anyone can buy shares once trading begins.

item.title: 32-year-old quit teaching and built a fidget-toy business with her dad. It brought in $428,000 last year
item.description: Charlie Moreton and Victoria Baumann are the father-daughter duo behind Victoria Essie Studio, which has seen viral success selling 3D-printed fidget toys.

item.title: Highly charismatic people use 5 'magnetic' phrases to be more likable, says public speaking expert
item.description: Public speaking expert and author Vanessa Van Edwards reveals the phrases that highly charismatic people use to build better relationships.

item.title: SpaceX IPO sticks the landing. Here's what investors are saying about its epic first trading day
item.description: Despite a large retail allocation and huge volume, volatility was moderate

item.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
item.description: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.

item.title: Moats vs. moonshots: The Warren Buffett-Elon Musk style debate
item.description: In 2018, Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly debated a key question that persists for modern investors.

item.title: Trump's name is gone from the Kennedy Center's facade, according to a top official at the arts venue
item.description: Dozens of people spent hours on Friday on the plaza in front of the Kennedy Center, occasionally cheering as they broke into chants of "take it down."

item.title: SpaceX IPO takeaways: SPCX closes at $161, jumping 19% after record debut
item.description: SpaceX rallied in its first day as a public company. CNBC provided updates throughout the day.

item.title: Drugmakers race to find a place in the next wave of obesity drugs
item.description: Drugmakers are betting they can crack into the obesity drug market that Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly currently dominate.
